name: doperpowers
description: SSFSKIM's fork of the Superpowers skills library for Claude Code (derived from obra/superpowers).

plugins.name: doperpowers
plugins.description: Fork of Superpowers (obra/superpowers): a full software-development methodology for coding agents — brainstorm, plan, subagent-driven TDD, review — plus fork-specific skills like orchestrating-daemons.
